description: Find EV charging stations, detail, and reliability check-ins via the global Open Charge Map.
name: io.github.cyanheads/openchargemap-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Open Charge Map API key, sent as the X-API-Key header on every request. Free instant signup at openchargemap.org.
environmentVariables.name: OPENCHARGEMAP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the OCM API base URL (default https://api.openchargemap.io/v3). For a private mirror or testing.
environmentVariables.name: OPENCHARGEMAP_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: When true, refresh reference data from the live /referencedata endpoint at startup, falling back to the bundled snapshot on failure.
environmentVariables.name: OPENCHARGEMAP_REFERENCE_REFRESH

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
